case_title: JESCHKE, PAUL VS GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIWAY & TRANSPORTATION DISTRICT

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JESCHKE, PAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIWAY & TRANSPORTATION DISTRICT $271.86 PRINCIPAL, $27.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $298.86, JUDGMENT CORRECTED - CLERICAL ERROR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $271.86 FILED BY JESCHKE, PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIWAY & TRANSPORTATION DISTRICT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-15-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIWAY & TRANSPORTATION DISTRICT
COPY OF CORRESPONDANCE FROM JOHN GLENN, ADUSTERS & ADMISTRATORS, INC TO PAUL JESCHKE RECEIVED AND FILED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JESCHKE, PAUL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIWAY & TRANSPORTATION DISTRICT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
COPY OF LETTER SENT TO PLTF W/PYMT FILED
REQUEST TO CORRECT/VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLTF. $14.00 FEE PAID.
CERTIFIED MAILING TO JANET S. TARANTINO, SECT, GG BRIDGE HIWAY & TRANS DIST. RETURNED SIGNED.
